title: 720p Controller Icons for Legacy 4J
description: Changes the 1080p buttons to the ones that fit 720p
body:
## This is Archived! ⚠ Due to the Legacy4J updates, Legacy4J already provides the features this resource pack offers. ## About this Resource Pack This resource pack replaces the Legacy4J's 1080p controller tooltips to ones that fit at 720p. ## Requirements This resource pack requires Legacy4J, which is used on modpacks such as [Re-Console](https://modrinth.com/modpack/legacy-minecraft) by Nostalgica Reverie (on versions prior to 1.0) or the now discontinued [Legacy Reborn](https://modrinth.com/modpack/legacy-reborn) by Legacy Projects/Permdog99. ## Credits Cjnator38 for ripping the 720p version of Xbox One Edition Tooltips
Wilyicaro for providing the PlayStation®4 Edition Tooltips (which were used in Legacy4J prior to version 1.7)
